reviews.review_description:
Good sound and graphics but it is require more immersive shining in graphics as well as horror mechanic. 

I get scare easily in horror games and i love it but in your game i hardly feel any fear. Check out how following free experiences do the job in great way, learn from it.

1. Face your Fears
2. Sisters

If you make it further improve with more horror and scary movements then it would be nice.

Update April 25, 2017: Not scary yet even after lightning effect and extra sounds. Do add some jump scares close to sitting chair to put in fear in the heart.
Was ok. You don't do anything other than sit there and look around. Was not very scary.
If you're looking for a good scare, Don't Look Away does the job. Great graphics, an interesting horror scenario  and a frightening villain.

I read through some reveiws and everyone is saying how terrible it is, its not terrible but its not the best. Vr is still new so don't complain. They over did the fog a little so it was kinda hard to see. When you pick up the phone and the paper they were kinda in the way and I just wanted to drop it but I couldn't. Probably could have had a little more happen in it, it was kinda slow. It could have been longer maybe different stories to pick through ( or levels, whatever you want.to call it.) It was a pretty good app, it was free so id say it was worth it. If you made another app, I would definatly check it out.
Why cant I install this game anymore? It keeps saying download failed
Tremenda porqueria, a waste of time, it takes too long for some thing to appear and the things that appear are not scary at all
Should have multiple different levels on it besides just the one boring one. My son wasn't scared
Pretty dang good just wish there was more. i was sad that it was over at the end. Other than that it is amazing

developer_response.body: Thank you blp103 for the kind words! We are hard at work on another title that will use the new GearVR Remote. Stay tuned at @eos_interactive on twitter!

reviews.review_description: I give this game a solid f -. There were literally only two things to do.
Unfortunately not a good app. Bad story, very bad graphics, like a playstation2 game at its best,it doesn't build any mood and very cheap scare tactics.
Graphic and sound effect quality is poor. So I can't enjoy this.
Well paced horror, playing on that unsettling need to look where you're warned not to, and the fear of the unseen

System crash unlike I have witnessed before. Now i dont know if it was the app or my gear that failed. My gear has been erratic to say the least. Ive uninstalled everything, factory reset and still the same  bullsh*t. As for the content of this app i enjoyed ir for the most part. Its definitely original and entertaining. Since I dont know qhat the trigger was for the crash im going to have them share the responsibility and that is why its sitting here with a 3.

I mistakenly read the more positive reviews before trying this experience. It's very basic and not a lot happens, it seems more like a demo than a complete game. Graphics are OK but there are deffinately much better free  experiences such as the fantastic Face Your Fears.
